title: volvulus soldanella
intro: Volvulus soldanella, also known as Soldanella or alpine catchfly, is a flowering plant in the carnation family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce fever, and relieve menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Volvulus soldanella include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, Volvulus soldanella is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
